title: Minimum Deviation in Array
hints: Notice that odd numbers can only increase while even numbers can only decrease. This creates a bounded range of possible values for each element.
Use a max-heap to efficiently access the current largest element. The key is to reduce the maximum value whenever it is even to try and shrink the overall spread.
Track the minimum value seen so far as you process the heap. The answer is the smallest difference between the current maximum and this running minimum.
